VAL-FOUND-015.evidence: Test singlePointWithHelpersConstant() passed — verifies single point at center of 100x100 grid with RSSI=-50 produces constant output across all pixels.

VAL-FOUND-016.evidence: Test twoPointGradientWithThird() passed — verifies two points at opposite edges (left=-30, right=-90) with midpoint at -60 and correct gradient direction.

VAL-FOUND-017.evidence: Test proximityDominance() passed — verifies pixel 1 unit from point A(-40) and 10 units from B/C has value within 2 dBm of -40.

VAL-FOUND-018.evidence: Test idwPowerParameterP2() passed — verifies IDW uses p=2.0 (Shepard's method) with known-answer test case.

VAL-FOUND-019.evidence: Test zeroDistanceReturnsExactValue() passed — pixel at exact measurement point returns that point's value with no division by zero.

VAL-FOUND-020.evidence: Test in HeatmapRenderer IDW suite passed — render() returns non-nil CGImage with expected pixel dimensions. Suite 'HeatmapRenderer IDW' passed.

VAL-FOUND-021.evidence: Test in HeatmapRenderer IDW suite verified default 200x200 grid rendering with correct output dimensions. Suite passed.

VAL-FOUND-022.evidence: Test performance50Points() passed in 0.143 seconds (<500ms threshold). Suite 'HeatmapRenderer Performance' passed.

VAL-FOUND-023.evidence: Test performance200Points() passed in 0.511 seconds (<2000ms threshold). Suite 'HeatmapRenderer Performance' passed.

VAL-FOUND-024.evidence: Tests signalStrengthGreen(), signalStrengthYellow(), signalStrengthRed() all passed — RSSI >= -50 green, -50 to -70 yellow, <= -70 red.

VAL-FOUND-025.evidence: Tests snrGreen(), snrYellow(), snrRed() all passed — SNR > 25 green, 15-25 yellow, < 15 red.

VAL-FOUND-026.evidence: Tests downloadSpeedGreen(), downloadSpeedYellow(), downloadSpeedRed() all passed — >100 Mbps green, 25-100 yellow, <25 red.

VAL-FOUND-027.evidence: Tests uploadSpeedGreen(), uploadSpeedYellow(), uploadSpeedRed() all passed — same thresholds as downloadSpeed.

VAL-FOUND-028.evidence: Tests latencyGreen(), latencyYellow(), latencyRed() all passed — <10ms green, 10-50 yellow, >50 red.

VAL-FOUND-029.evidence: Tests defaultOpacity70Percent() and customOpacity() both passed — default alpha = 0.7 (178/255) verified.

VAL-FOUND-030.evidence: Tests valueClamping() and clampingExtremeLatency() both passed — extreme RSSI and latency values clamped without crash.

VAL-FOUND-031.evidence: Tests 'takeMeasurement returns MeasurementPoint with RSSI, SSID, BSSID from WiFi service' and 'takeMeasurement does NOT populate speed/latency fields' passed — passive measurement verified with mock WiFiInfoService.

VAL-FOUND-032.evidence: Test 'takeActiveMeasurement populates downloadSpeed, uploadSpeed, latency' passed — active measurement returns populated speed and latency fields via mock SpeedTest and Ping services.

VAL-FOUND-033.evidence: Tests 'startContinuousMeasurement returns AsyncStream yielding measurements', 'stopContinuousMeasurement terminates the stream', 'continuous measurement respects the specified interval' (0.312s), and 'stopping and restarting continuous measurement works' all passed — stream yields at ~500ms intervals and terminates on stop.

VAL-FOUND-034.evidence: Source file WiFiMeasurementEngine.swift declares 'public actor WiFiMeasurementEngine: HeatmapServiceProtocol' — confirmed actor type. Also test 'WiFiMeasurementEngine is an actor conforming to HeatmapServiceProtocol' passed. Compiles under SWIFT_STRICT_CONCURRENCY: complete (swift test exit code 0).

VAL-FOUND-035.evidence: Tests 'takeMeasurement delegates to WiFiInfoService' and 'takeActiveMeasurement calls speed test and ping services' passed — engine accepts any WiFiInfoServiceProtocol and delegates calls verified via mock.

VAL-FOUND-045.evidence: Test allFiveTypesProduceDistinctOutput() passed — each of the five visualization types produces distinct color output for identical measurement data.

VAL-FOUND-046.evidence: Tests returnsNilForZeroPoints(), returnsNilForOnePoint(), returnsNilForTwoPoints() all passed — renderer returns nil with fewer than 3 measurement points.

VAL-FOUND-051.evidence: Tests dualColorSchemes() and wifimanColorScheme() both passed — Phase 1 green-yellow-red and Phase 3 WiFiman blue-cyan-green-yellow-orange-red schemes verified with correct scheme applied based on configuration.

summary: Tested 24 assertions: all 24 passed. All NetMonitorCore tests (1020 tests in 122 suites) passed with exit code 0. HeatmapRenderer IDW, Color Mapping, Performance suites and WiFiMeasurementEngine suite all passed. VAL-FOUND-034 confirmed via source inspection (public actor WiFiMeasurementEngine).
